holdings.infoBox: DIM is an equity ETF with a total of 596 individual holdings. The top holdings are AIB Group stock at 1.39%, WH Group at 0.96%, Banca Mediolanum at 0.93%, Tenaris at 0.86%, and Admiral Group at 0.78%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree International MidCap Dividend Fund (DIM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of dividend-paying mid-cap companies located in the developed world outside the US and Canada. DIM was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.
